_summary: Cooperative pause of category='cosmetic' while document.hidden via governor.pauseCategory. Money-flow (raw setInterval) unaffected. Admin stays live (governed in PR-H).

implementation.tick_gate: src/lib/util/visible-interval.ts — tick() returns early when isCategoryPaused(cat)

behavior_change.cosmetic_tracked: skipped while hidden AND while governor-paused
behavior_change.admin_tracked: still skipped while hidden (intrinsic), NOT governor-paused yet

validation.raw_breakdown: 12 money-flow FREEZE + 1 rpc.surface DEV collector + 1 governor watcher (none in business logic)

scenario: Run __phonaraSurface.report() after [active 5m → hidden 5m → idle 5m] and compare hidden bucket against reports/rpc.surface.2026-05-21.json baseline. PR-G expectation: hidden.count drops sharply for cosmetic-driven RPCs; admin polling unchanged.
